subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The Most Great House in Baghdad had fallen, in most parts, into ruin, and I desired to undertake its restoration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان بیت مکرم در بغداد اکثر مواقعش ویران شده بود خواستم که بتاسیس
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @petitions to authorities, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
